_publications._publicationTitle: Structural and functional analyses of a germline KRAS T50I mutation provide insights into Raf activation.

_contextSnippet: Phosphorylated (p-) ERK1/2 and S6 S235/236 levels were constitutively elevated in MOLM-13 cells due to oncogenic FLT3 signaling
details: Successfully detected constitutively elevated p-ERK1/2 levels in MOLM-13 cells due to oncogenic FLT3 signaling and variable maintenance of ERK activation in cells expressing different K-Ras mutants
